note: Created WireguardGoConnectsToWgSocketListenerTests.cs with 6 integration tests: HandshakeCompletes_WhenWireguardGoInitiates, WgSocketStats_ShowPeerAfterHandshake, DataTransfer_WgSocketToWireguardGo, DataTransfer_WireguardGoToWgSocket, BidirectionalTransfer_BothDirectionsSimultaneously, MultipleSequentialTransfers_AllSucceed. Tests skip gracefully when wireguard-go is unavailable.
